name: Chocolate Meringue Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine, sugars, yolk, and 1 tsp vanilla in a large bowl.
2. Gradually mix in dry ingredients (milk or water).
3. Spread the batter evenly in a 9" x 13-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top of the batter.
5. Beat egg whites to soft peaks. Gradually add brown sugar and remaining vanilla.
6. Gently fold nuts into the meringue mixture.
7. Carefully spread the meringue over the chocolate chips.
8. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes, or until set.
9. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
